pillar_metadata.name: Warmth
pillar_metadata.description: Supportive energy that nurtures growth, trust, and systemic stability.

energy_restoration.impact: Boosts growth and stability while repairing damage from Harm.

friction_reduction.impact: Makes the system more adaptable and less rigid by lowering internal friction.

complacency.result: Warmth Exploitation; units prioritize comfort over production and execution.

hostility.result: Coldness; high friction, lack of trust, and eventual systemic fragmentation.
